name: image
description: Read image dimensions from PNG/JPEG/GIF/BMP headers (native Rust)
author: system

hints.overview: Read image dimensions from binary headers without decoding the full image.
criticalRules: Input must be Uint8Array (raw image bytes), not base64 string
Use detectImageDimensions(data) when format is unknown
Use getImageDimensions(data, format) when you know the format
commonPatterns: Download + measure: const img = fetchBinary(url); const dims = detectImageDimensions(img)
